op.text: Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain or worse; wearing walking boot; seeing orthopedist Thursday 2025-04-18; doctor said eight to ten weeks before running again

Was training for Lakefront Marathon in October 2025; withdrew registration on Monday 2025-04-14 after ankle injury made completion impossible; described the training arc as 'the first future-shaped thing I'd built since mom'
In physical therapy recovery for ankle sprain; expected to last several weeks after boot period; continuing Dorothy Jean restoration work on Sundays (can sand planks while sitting)
